master_row.title: Field Phys Spec Relation
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Adjoint Functor Correspondence] The forward harmonic decomposition functor: \begin{equation} \mathcal{F}: \cat{Field}_{\text{phys}} \rightarrow \cat{Spec}_{\text{obs}} \end{equation} admits a right adjoint: \begin{equation} \mathcal{R}: \cat{Spec}_{\text{obs}} \rightarrow \cat{Field}_{\text{phys}} \end{equation} such that: \begin{equation} \Hom_{\cat{Spec}}(\mathcal{F}(X), Y) \cong \Hom_{\cat{Field}}(X, \mathcal{R}(Y)) \end{equation} naturally in $X \in \cat{Field}_{\text{phys}}$ and $Y \in \cat{Spec}_{\text{obs}}$. \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Categorical Framework for Reverse Harmonics’.
